pmm-1.title: Structured Confluence template
pmm-1.body: Consistent research template for positioning, competitive intel, and messaging. Structured so AI can parse it.

pmm-1.title: First AI workflow: sales enablement
pmm-1.body: AI extracts structured data → generates first-draft battle cards, one-pagers, objection handlers. PMM reviews all output.

pmm-1.title: Delivered interviews (ongoing)
pmm-1.body: Primary research engine. Customer and prospect interviews feeding the whole system.

pmm-1.title: Competitor analysis via Claude Code
pmm-1.body: Use competitor analysis as the vehicle to learn Claude Code. Scheduled tasks make it a natural fit for recurring monitoring — a living example of Phase 1 AI habits in action.

pmm-2.title: Airtable output archive + scoring
pmm-2.body: AI-generated enablement archived with metadata. PMM scores quarterly — scoring feeds back to improve AI output quality.

pmm-2.title: Expanded research inputs
pmm-2.body: Broader inputs beyond Delivered: analyst reports, market data, competitor monitoring. Shape after Shauna alignment.

pmm-3.title: Human-in-the-loop → QA cadence
pmm-3.body: After 2 quarters of PMM reviewing all outputs, shift to sampling-based QA. System opens to wider team for self-serve enablement.

pmm-3.title: Automated research → enablement flow
pmm-3.body: Research outputs feed enablement, content, and distribution automatically. Define triggers and quality gates together.

content-1.title: Content workflow into ClickUp
content-1.body: All content requests, briefs, and production tracked in ClickUp with clear ownership and due dates. Replaces Slack-based coordination.

content-1.title: Content audit & gap analysis
content-1.body: Map existing assets to buyer journey stages and ABM programs. Identify gaps by format and persona.

content-1.title: Delivered / beehiiv pilot
content-1.body: Tom leads beehiiv setup as a deliberate hands-on automation pilot — getting direct experience without relying on Kaylee. Long-term Customer.io migration stays on the horizon.

content-2.title: AI content pipeline (always-on)
content-2.body: AI agents take primary research (Delivered transcripts, positioning docs) and continuously generate: briefs, headlines, social angles, email concepts, video scripts. Content team reviews, selects, operationalises.

content-2.title: Broader format coverage
content-2.body: Expand from blog + social into video, infographics, on-site content, customer stories. AI handles first drafts across formats.

content-3.title: 1 interview → 5+ assets
content-3.body: One Delivered interview or research input automatically generates content across multiple formats and channels. Content team curates, not creates from scratch.

content-3.title: Content keeps pace with campaign calendar
content-3.body: Pipeline output matches distribution demand. No content bottleneck for ABM programs or brand campaigns.

growth-1.title: 5 ABM programs live
growth-1.body: Trade & Industrial, Perishables, Bulky & Valuables, Pipeline Accelerator, Territory Accelerator. Cluster-based targeting per Fullfunnel.io framework.

growth-1.title: Airtable ABM backbone
growth-1.body: Account movements, engagement tracking, signal capture. Already operational — expand to archive AI outputs with scoring.

growth-1.title: ClickUp-first for campaigns
growth-1.body: Campaign briefs, tasks, and coordination in ClickUp. Clear ownership and due dates replacing Slack threads.

growth-2.title: One-brief → cluster variants
growth-2.body: One source brief, AI-adapted per account cluster. Instead of manually tailoring for each ABM program, AI generates cluster-specific messaging variants.

growth-2.title: Signal-led campaign triggers
growth-2.body: Airtable signals trigger ClickUp workflows automatically. Define signal taxonomy and response playbooks together.

growth-3.title: Campaign personalisation at scale
growth-3.body: Full system: research → content → distribution adapted per cluster from one brief. Campaign strategy, experimentation, and signal analysis replace manual content production.

tools-1.title: ClickUp adoption
tools-1.body: ClickUp-first for all tasks and collaboration. Leadership models the behaviour.

tools-1.title: Confluence structured inputs
tools-1.body: Research template established. Source-of-truth pages that AI can read from.

tools-1.title: AI tooling evaluation
tools-1.body: Define use cases first, evaluate tools together. Budget exists.

tools-2.title: AI tool(s) selected and deployed
tools-2.body: Based on Phase 1 use cases. Integrated with Confluence (input), Airtable (output), ClickUp (workflow).

tools-2.title: Training and enablement
tools-2.body: Team onboarding to AI workflows. Defined roles: who reviews, who triggers, who QAs.

tools-3.title: System opens to wider team
tools-3.body: Self-serve AI outputs with QA cadence. Established feedback loops improving output quality continuously.

tools-3.title: Ops review and optimisation
tools-3.body: Quarterly review of what's working, what's not. Refine workflows, retire what isn't adding value.

outcomes-1.title: Clear answer for the business
outcomes-1.body: "How is Marketing using AI?" — first workflow live, visible, measurable.

outcomes-2.title: Time back for higher-value work
outcomes-2.body: Less reformatting, less starting from scratch. More primary research, creative direction, campaign strategy.

outcomes-3.title: Better day-to-day for everyone
outcomes-3.body: Less chasing hand-offs, less manual coordination. People doing work they're good at and enjoy.
